title: Factors Affecting Option Prices: The Black-Scholes model assumes that stock prices follow a deterministic...
summary: Identify key factors affecting option prices: volatility, time, underlying price, and interest rates.
prompt: The Black-Scholes model assumes that stock prices follow a deterministic path.
solution: False; the Black-Scholes model assumes that stock prices follow a stochastic process, specifically geometric Brownian motion, accounting for random fluctuations in price.
